meta.title: Contact Us | Pro-Tech Staffing
meta.description: Get in touch with Pro-Tech Staffing. We respond to all inquiries within one business day.

hero.heading: Get in touch
hero.description: Whether you're looking for work, want to hire, or have a general question — we're here to help. We respond to every inquiry within one business day.

jobSeekers.title: I'm looking for work
jobSeekers.desc: Submit an application to our talent pool. Our recruiters will match you with available roles in your area.

employers.title: I want to hire workers
employers.desc: Send us the role, shift, location, and start date. We'll respond within one business day with screened candidates.

general.title: I have a general question
general.desc: For everything else — partnerships, press, vendor inquiries, or anything you can't find on the site.

form.heading: Send us a message
form.description: Fill out the form below and a member of our team will reach out within one business day.
form.name: Name
form.responseTime: We respond to all inquiries within one business day.

offices.heading: Six markets. Local teams in each.
offices.description: Reach out to your nearest Pro-Tech office directly — every market has a local team that knows the work, the employers, and the labor pool.
